# Titan Fishing Fan Site — Full Content

> Titan Fishing (Vietnamese: Câu Cá Vạn Cân) is a deep-sea fishing adventure on Roblox developed by TGaming. This unofficial fan site covers game guides, working redeem codes, tips, and FAQs in English and Vietnamese.

Site URL: https://titanfishing.org
Languages: English (/), Vietnamese (/vi/)

---

## What is Titan Fishing?

Titan Fishing is a free-to-play Roblox game that replaces the slow fishing simulator formula with real-time boss battles. Every catch is a high-stakes fight against colossal sea creatures.

Key mechanics:
- Precision casting: aim for the Orange Zone to boost luck and attract rarer fish
- Boss-style combat: click rapidly to reduce fish HP while managing line tension
- Skill Books: unlock Z (reel speed) and X (burst damage) abilities via Skill Books
- Rod upgrades: Basic Rod → Golden Rod progression; skip the Rusty Rod
- Island exploration: 5+ islands with increasing difficulty and rewards
- World bosses: Ice Boss and other Titans spawn every 30 minutes, server-wide

---

## Working Titan Fishing Codes (March 2026)

| Code | Reward | Status |
|------|--------|--------|
| SORRY2026 | 1 Shark Rod Skin + 1 Mythical Book | Active |
| 1MVISITS | 50,000 in-game money | Active |
| 50KMONEY | 50,000 in-game money | Active |
| MYTHICAL | 1 Mythical Book | Active |
| 30XLUCK2026 | 30x Luck Boost | Active |
| BIGSHARK26 | Big Shark Rod Skin | Active |
| QUALITY4MVISITS | Exclusive 4M visits reward | Active |
| NEWERA2026 | Exclusive New Era reward | Active |
| LOVES2026 | Axe Rod Skin | Expired |
| LOVE2026 | Reward | Expired |

How to redeem: Launch Titan Fishing on Roblox → open Settings (⚙️) → scroll to "Enter Code" → paste code → press Claim.

---

## Tips for New Players

- Always aim for the Orange Zone when casting to maximize luck
- Skip the Rusty Rod — save money and go straight to the Golden Rod
- Use bait to increase luck before casting
- Combine 1MVISITS + 50KMONEY for 100,000 free money at the start
- Mythical Books are the rarest skill tier — redeem SORRY2026 and MYTHICAL immediately
- Join the developer's Discord and follow TGaming on YouTube for new codes

---

## FAQ

Q: Is Titan Fishing free?
A: Yes, completely free on Roblox. Some items can be purchased with in-game money earned through gameplay or redeemed via codes.

Q: Can I redeem the same code twice?
A: No, each code can only be redeemed once per account.

Q: Where do new codes come from?
A: Developer Discord, Tùng Nguyễn Facebook profile, and TGaming YouTube channel.

Q: What is a Mythical Book?
A: The rarest skill tier in Titan Fishing. Rolling one normally costs 20,000+ cash — codes give them for free.

Q: How often do Titan bosses spawn?
A: Every 30 minutes. All players on the server can participate and earn top-tier loot.

---

## Site Structure

- https://titanfishing.org/ — English homepage
- https://titanfishing.org/vi/ — Vietnamese homepage
- https://titanfishing.org/codes/ — English codes page
- https://titanfishing.org/vi/codes/ — Vietnamese codes page
- https://titanfishing.org/skills/ — Skill tier list (English)
- https://titanfishing.org/vi/skills/ — Danh sách kỹ năng (Vietnamese)
- https://titanfishing.org/sitemap.xml — XML sitemap
